name: Roast Turkey
recipeInstructions:
1. How much to buy: 1/2 lb per serving.
2. Defrost time: 20-lb bird takes 3 days in the fridge or 12 hours in a sink of water. Remove giblets as soon as thawed.
3. Roast time: Unstuffed, chilled turkey at 325°F -
- 6-8 lbs: 2 3/4 to 3 1/2 hours
- 8-12 lbs: 3 1/4 to 4 hours
- 12-16 lbs: 3 1/2 to 4 hours
- 16-20 lbs: 4 to 6 hours
- 20-26 lbs: 5 1/2 to 7 1/2 hours
4. Stuffing: Add 25 minutes cooking time for birds under 12 lb.
